channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Thursday, April 30, 2026
item.description: Three threads deserve your immediate attention today, Midya. First, Canada's proposed 10-point tightening of the international student program is the most consequential higher-ed policy signal in months — it reshapes enrolment projections for every Canadian university you might a...
